test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to supplier list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Suppliers'
expected_result: Supplier list page loads successfully; Data table is visible with columns for code
column8: status; 'Add Supplier' button is visible and enabled; Page is responsive and loads within acceptable time

test_desc: Smoke - Create a new supplier with all required fields
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Click 'Add Supplier' button; Fill code field with 'SUP-001'; Fill name field with 'PT Elektronik Jaya'; Fill npwp field with '01.234.567.8-012.345'; Fill address field with 'Jl. Gatot Subroto No. 88, Jakarta Selatan'; Fill paymentTerms field with 'Net 30'; Fill leadTimeDays field with '14'; Fill bankDetails with 'BCA - 1234567890 - PT Elektronik Jaya'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: New supplier is created successfully; Success notification appears; Supplier 'PT Elektronik Jaya' appears in the list with code 'SUP-001' and status='active' (default); All entered fields are correctly persisted

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Locate row with code 'SUP-001'; Click on the row or click 'View' action button
expected_result: Supplier detail page opens; All fields display correctly: code='SUP-001', name='PT Elektronik Jaya', npwp='01.234.567.8-012.345', address shown, paymentTerms='Net 30', leadTimeDays='14', bankDetails shown, status='active'; Contacts section is visible (empty initially); Products section is visible (empty initially); Edit and Delete buttons are available

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Locate row with code 'SUP-001'; Click 'Edit' action button; Change paymentTerms from 'Net 30' to 'Net 45'; Change leadTimeDays from '14' to '21'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Supplier is updated successfully; paymentTerms now shows 'Net 45'; leadTimeDays now shows '21'; All other fields remain unchanged; Success notification appears

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Click 'Add Supplier' button; Fill code field with 'SUP-002'; Fill name field with 'CV Maju Bersama'; Fill npwp field with '02.345.678.9-023.456'; Fill address field with 'Jl. Ahmad Yani No. 55, Surabaya'; Fill paymentTerms field with 'Net 60'; Fill leadTimeDays field with '7'; Fill bankDetails with 'Mandiri - 9876543210 - CV Maju Bersama'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Second supplier created successfully; Both 'SUP-001' and 'SUP-002' appear in the supplier list; All fields for SUP-002 are correctly persisted

test_desc: Full CRUD - Add primary contact to supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Locate 'SUP-001' and click to view details; In the Contacts section click 'Add Contact' button; Fill contact name field with 'Budi Santoso'; Select role dropdown value 'sales'; Fill phone field with '0812-3456-7890'; Fill email field with 'budi@elektronikjaya.co.id'; Set isPrimary toggle to 'Yes'; Click Submit or Save Contact button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Contact 'Budi Santoso' is added successfully to supplier SUP-001; Contact appears in the contacts list with role='sales', phone and email displayed, and a 'Primary' badge visible; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Add multiple contacts with different roles
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; View details of 'SUP-001'; In Contacts section click 'Add Contact'; Fill name with 'Sari Dewi'; Select role 'ar'; Fill phone with '0813-9876-5432'; Fill email with 'sari.ar@elektronikjaya.co.id'; Set isPrimary to 'No'; Click Save; Wait for success; Click 'Add Contact' again; Fill name with 'Eko Prasetyo'; Select role 'logistics'; Fill phone with '0814-1111-2222'; Fill email with 'eko.logistics@elektronikjaya.co.id'; Set isPrimary to 'No'; Click Save; Wait for success
expected_result: Three contacts now exist for SUP-001: Budi Santoso (sales, primary), Sari Dewi (ar, not primary), Eko Prasetyo (logistics, not primary); All contacts display correct roles, phone numbers, and emails; Only one contact is marked as primary

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; View details of 'SUP-001'; In Contacts section locate 'Sari Dewi'; Click 'Edit' on that contact; Change phone from '0813-9876-5432' to '0813-1111-3333'; Change email from 'sari.ar@elektronikjaya.co.id' to 'sari.finance@elektronikjaya.co.id'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Contact is updated successfully; Phone now shows '0813-1111-3333'; Email now shows 'sari.finance@elektronikjaya.co.id'; Role and isPrimary remain unchanged; Success notification appears

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; View details of 'SUP-001'; In Contacts section locate 'Eko Prasetyo'; Click 'Delete' on that contact; Confirm deletion in confirmation dialog; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Contact 'Eko Prasetyo' is removed from the contacts list; Only two contacts remain: Budi Santoso (primary) and Sari Dewi; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Link products to supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; View details of 'SUP-001'; In Products section click 'Link Product' or 'Add Product' button; Select productId for 'Wireless Mouse' (SKU-ELEC-0001); Fill supplierPrice with '70000'; Fill minOrderQty with '50'; Fill supplierSku with 'EJ-WM-001'; Click Save; Wait for success; Click 'Link Product' again; Select productId for 'Mechanical Keyboard' (SKU-ELEC-0002); Fill supplierPrice with '420000'; Fill minOrderQty with '20'; Fill supplierSku with 'EJ-MK-001'; Click Save; Wait for success
expected_result: Two products are linked to supplier SUP-001; Product list shows: Wireless Mouse with supplierPrice=70000, minOrderQty=50, supplierSku='EJ-WM-001'; Mechanical Keyboard with supplierPrice=420000, minOrderQty=20, supplierSku='EJ-MK-001'; Success notifications appear for both

test_desc: Full CRUD - Unlink a product from supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; View details of 'SUP-001'; In Products section locate 'Mechanical Keyboard'; Click 'Unlink' or 'Remove' button; Confirm in confirmation dialog; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Product 'Mechanical Keyboard' is unlinked from supplier SUP-001; Only 'Wireless Mouse' remains in the linked products list; The product itself is NOT deleted from the product catalog, only the supplier-product association is removed; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Soft delete a supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Locate 'SUP-002' (CV Maju Bersama); Click 'Delete' action button; Confirm deletion in confirmation dialog; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Supplier 'SUP-002' is soft-deleted; No longer appears in the default active supplier list; Success notification appears; Supplier record still exists in database with deletedAt timestamp

test_desc: Edge Case - Duplicate supplier code validation
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Click 'Add Supplier' button; Fill code field with 'SUP-001' (already exists); Fill name field with 'Duplicate Code Test'; Fill remaining required fields with valid data; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected; Error message indicates supplier code 'SUP-001' already exists or must be unique; No duplicate supplier is created; User remains on the form with entered data preserved

test_desc: Edge Case - Required fields and NPWP format validation
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Click 'Add Supplier' button; Leave all fields empty; Click Submit button; Observe validation errors; Then fill code with 'SUP-NPWP-001'; Fill name with 'NPWP Format Test'; Fill npwp with 'invalid-npwp-format'; Fill address with 'Test Address'; Fill paymentTerms with 'Net 30'; Fill leadTimeDays with '10'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Empty form submission: Rejected with required field validation errors for code, name, and other mandatory fields; NPWP format test: Either rejected with NPWP format validation error (expected format XX.XXX.XXX.X-XXX.XXX), or accepted if NPWP format is not strictly validated; Clear error messages guide the user to correct the issues
